title: Rho Market - Rekt
relevance_summary: Oracle misconfiguration exploited by MEV bot to drain $7.5 million in a matter of minutes

prevention.rule: Block any tx that manipulates price data within a short time frame after oracle configuration changes

red_flags: Large volume of transactions in a short time frame
summary: An oracle misconfiguration allowed an MEV bot to manipulate price data, draining $7.5 million from Rho Market in a matter of minutes. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions by monitoring price data manipulation shortly after oracle configuration changes.
